# mtncloud_scale_threshold (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud autoscale threshold (CPU/memory/disk based scaling rules).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mtncloud_scale_threshold" "web_cpu" {
  name           = "web-cpu-autoscale"
  auto_upscale   = true
  auto_downscale = true
  min_count      = 1
  max_count      = 5

  enable_cpu_threshold = true
  min_cpu_percentage   = 30
  max_cpu_percentage   = 75
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the scale threshold.

### Optional

- `auto_downscale` (Boolean) Whether to automatically scale down. Defaults to `false`.
- `auto_upscale` (Boolean) Whether to automatically scale up. Defaults to `false`.
- `enable_cpu_threshold` (Boolean) Whether CPU-based scaling is enabled.
- `enable_disk_threshold` (Boolean) Whether disk-based scaling is enabled.
- `enable_memory_threshold` (Boolean) Whether memory-based scaling is enabled.
- `max_count` (Number) Maximum number of instances.
- `max_cpu_percentage` (Number) CPU percentage above which to scale up.
- `max_disk_percentage` (Number) Disk percentage above which to scale up.
- `max_memory_percentage` (Number) Memory percentage above which to scale up.
- `min_count` (Number) Minimum number of instances.
- `min_cpu_percentage` (Number) CPU percentage below which to scale down.
- `min_disk_percentage` (Number) Disk percentage below which to scale down.
- `min_memory_percentage` (Number) Memory percentage below which to scale down.
- `scale_increment` (Number) Number of instances to add/remove per scaling action.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the scale threshold.
